ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the hospital */,
  "bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the hospital */,
  "icu_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds in the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the doctor works */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctors_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nurses" (
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nurse */,
  "nurse_name" TEXT /* Name of the nurse */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the nurse works */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the nurse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nurse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nurses_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_doctors" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g. primary, secondary, consulting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_nurses" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient */,
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nurse */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g. primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "nurse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medications" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "medication_id")
)
column_names: Contact email for inquiries about the hospital
Total number of beds in the hospital
Total number of ICU beds in the hospital
ID of the hospital where the doctor works
Years of experience of the doctor
ID of the hospital where the nurse works
Years of experience of the nurse
Type of relationship (e.g. primary, secondary, consulting)
